guater-game.description: SPONGEPHANES, the guater god, has appeared to take over bikini bottom with his minions, but according to the prophecy, the great SPONGEWARRIOR will stop him! Esto es fútbol al rojo vivo!!

f-is-for-fevil.description: When sea and thunder came to one. When reality and reason barely lasts. If dreams can come true, what does that say about nightmares?

infinete.description: Theorist talk about "the Kenny brothers", some SpongeBob sprites with human faces, the community has named them: Tommy, Temmy ,Timmy, Tammy and Tummy Kenny and believe they represent the 5 capital sins. Frank is also here. I don't even know who that is I think it's their older brother?

infinete-es-mix.description: Las PUTAS teorias hablan de los "hermanos en acción y aventura, Franciscos", algunos pantalones cuadrados arte de videjuego con caras de tío, la comunidad los llama: "Pepe", "Juan", "Franco", "Fran" y "Ioel", representan los 5 pecadores de la capital tio, también esta su hermano tío, su hermano y los globos, joder viva españa coño. Quieres que te lo traduzca y adapte automáticamente en otros idiomas, cualquier cosa dime!

sunderwater.description: Our favorite musician SQUIDWIRDY has been wondering where his neighbours, SUBARU and BOB EL TRISTE, have been. Suddenly, a not so familiar voice calls out from the dark, is that...? SPONGEBUD SQUAREGUY?

catch-and-fish.description: After their trip to El Caribe, BOYFRIDAY and SAMANTHA go visit the deep seas of Galicia, only to find JOSE JUAN (An evil version of jose) one of SPONGEPHANES closest friends and the reincarnation of JESUS himself

bubbletwister.description: After SUBARU died tragicly, BOB EL TRISTE's love for him never stopped, so he made a deal with an uknown entity to enter UNDERGUTATER LIMBO so he can meet his lost love again, but SUBARU isn't very happy to see him...

vash-a-morir.description: Pachy the Pirate has finally found the lost spongebob episode on a... DVD? Written in blood it spells "DVD AMARILLO". What our favorite pirate didn't expect, was to find a hiperrealistic bleeding spongebob that would hypnotize him into literally shitting himself to death.

paracetamol.description: Our least favorite boss, KRABITY PATTITI, told BOB to get more ketchup, but when he came back, he found his restaurant covered in it. It seems like the ketchup was some type of drug and is making everyone hallucinate! BOB became MR KETCHUP, and is now seeking revange from KRABITY and his awful oponion on burgers.

ups-me-caigo.description: While Miyamoto was sealing Tails Doll in Nintendo's headquarters, Sakurai finds out that there's another possible threat to the company, and, as such, it must be neutralized.

rent-due.description: Hu The Man, the human, has been searching for his friends from Instituto Sonic, sadly, he found them all dead by the hands of USA. Hu The Man will now get his revenge.

rumbeling.description: After BIKINI BOTTOM went crazy, PAKMA and his partners are trying to get the secret formula to put an end to this madness, but they're not the only ones seeking to obtain it

powerscaling.description: Finally, BOB and his friends found the BURGER-GEM, but... a strange light beam hit BOB... turning him into the mean but powerful MERMAID BOB. It's time for the villian to take action and stop him for a greater good.

barnacles.description: BARNACLES GUY has invited RAINBOWDASH and SANS to his house for a lovely picnic, but with one condition, to not enter the library... Like Adam and Eve, they go into it only to find the bodies of all his lost friends, they try to escape, but it's too late, HE found them.

made-in-china.description: TEMUBOB is a bootleg version of BOB, a human soul resides in it, trapped by SPONGEPHANES after losing in his game, doomed forever to generate content farm videos on YOUTUBE

flintstone.description: After the events of VASH A MORIR, PATCHY and DVD became close friends, but patchy is still trying to find that lost episode. Seems he finally did. The SPONGEBOB episode where everyone dies and it's banned in 7639 countries

pool-parti.description: After the events of GUATER-GAME, our hero, SPONGEWARRIOR, unlocked a new form thanks to the prophecy, EL SUPER-GUERRERO. With this new form, he will finally stop SPONGEPHANES, who has conquered all of BIKINI BOTTOM

mega-mortal-madness.description: Many year have passed from the events of POOL PARTI, after SPONGEWARRIOR killed SPONGEPHANES, he freed all his prisioners in the process, freeing his lost gone brother, HORROR BOB, now, he will take revenge and finish the prophecy once and for all. SPONGEWARRIOR, on the other hand, already archived ULTRA-GUERRERO, but his age is starting to cause him trouble.

i-am-back.description: SPONGEPHANES has been trapped by a mysterious entity called... XEROPANTS? Seems to be an old friend of SPONGEPHANES, trying to get back to the spotlight through his mod. SPONGEPHANES called his most powerful minion to help: CUCARACHA-BOB

wordle.description: In his younger days, SPONGELORD was hosting a party with his friend POOPWARRIOR and the WORDLELINGS, his children, seems like you were... also invited?

fertility.description: In order to find a way to reproduce asexually, MEI finds FATAL BOB, who teaches MEI the art of MYTOSIS, sadly, because of the quantity of copies, his world is slowly crashing.

no-phone-zone.description: A young group of adults that should be getting jobs insted of going camping have been cornered by the old grumpy HYPNO-BOB, who cuts all signal from his woods and teaches humans how to live without WI-FI.

chromosome.description: This stupid black and white mutant cat has lost his precious spongebob balloon, following it to the balloon cementery, where they will say their last goodbye

daddatel.description: Our favorite sponge, DPONGEPANTI challanges BOBFRIEND to a friendly rap battle, will BOBFRIEND resist to the urge to gamble? Who cares I love to gamble, GAMBLE BOB FRIEND, DO IT!!!

try-and-trong.description: Sandy is in a recognition journey to find the 2 aliens that have arrived to Bikini Bottom, morphing into its citicens and slowly replacing them, her job is to capture them before they start reproducing.

steamunlocked.description: It seems you shouldn't have pirated your version of The Binding of Isaac from that sketchy website... Countless universes have had the misfortune of being corrupted by CRISBOBAL, Spongephanes' secret weapon for expanding his domain. Now it's up to poor little Isaac to defend his world and every Steam library, without knowing what's at stake.

aloha-aloha.description: UNDERGUATER-LOVER, also known as @Underwater36649, was finally able to invoke a meeting with his lord and saviour SPONGEPHANES, but by mistake she also brought KEVIN with them, PHANES best friend

go-to-eat.description: SPONGEWARRA, this universe version of the SPONGEWARRIOR, was just on a walk when BOB THE KILLER appeared. Now he is trying to MAKE WARRA eat his BURGERS, by all means necessary.

pneumonoultramicroscopicsilicovolcanocon.description: ABOBTI wants to get stronger... so he summons FUCKFACE in a satanic ritual, and asks him to be... invincible...

carmaland-retake.description: CARMEN was playing SPONGEBOB AND THE LOST SPATULA when a weird entity with an inmense love to the youtube series KARMALAND called BYSTAXX777 sucked her into this weird mixed realm

pop-a-corn.description: Our cast has made a plan to reset SPONGEPHANES and try to escape his digital circus. They will sing a song, distracting him, while BANSHI tries and resets him. Maybe only then they will recover their human forms and flee from his playground

spotting.description: XAVIGAMERS just found a way to summon SPONGEBRINE in his minecraft world! It didn't go as plan though... he will have to use the power of the EMERALD MOON!

unheard.description: S-TERNON was just an innocent follower of SPONGEPHANES, inspired by his mod and creativity, he also wanted to make his own mod. After several attemps, each one growing older, better, and more talented, he finally has something he is proud to show

la-playa.description: Just a sunny day in the beach.

kaka.description: Mei had enough with postroff not paying rent for months, so she sends him to playtest her new and unfinished spongebob mod, so unfinished that not even i know what's out there...

ayuda-por-favor.description: In a SPONGEPHANE's nightmare, SPONGELORD started his plan to corrupt everything and everyone with his XSquareVirus, turning them into their mindless minions. Only SPONGEPHANES is left, fighting the corruption as hard as he can.

for-you-some-day.description: Before the events of BUBBLETWISTER, BOBELTRISTE put his feelings into this letter, a letter with the hope of finding its addressee, the one long gone.

corre-corre-que-te-pillo.description: SPONGEPHANES is... back? And terrorizing back again bikini bottom! It's time for... base SPONGEWARRIOR? to... stop him...?
